detail: mythings.testing ships as an explicit pytest_plugins opt-in, not a pytest11 entry point: core is a runtime dep of every tool, so an entry point would auto-load fixtures into every pytest run in the shared venv; the one-line opt-in is greppable and scoped. Promotes the fleet's most-copied fakes (FakeGh, ScriptedEngine, fake_fetch, ledger factories, make_git_repo, clean_git_env/attended_env) — the attended_env promotion the docs deferred until a third consumer needed it.
